MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-19-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Tabernacle Community Development Corporation'S Motion To Consolidate Actions Of Case(S) Csm-17-856706 With Case Cgc-18-565167.
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF TABERNACLE COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-17-856706 WITH CASE CGC-18-565167.

Appearances: Vernon C. Goins of Goins & Associates (510.663.3700) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party; Donald Franklin (415.294.0203) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona.

Argued and the Court takes the matter under submission. Mr. Franklin submits a copy of his opposition, and is directed to provide a copy to opposing counsel. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-17-856706 WITH CASE CGC-18-565167
